data.body:
## Implementation Plan Summary

7 tasks created under this epic (epic-direct mode — no intermediate stories):

| ID | Task | testing_mode | Status |
|----|------|--------------|--------|
| 77aa-0905 | Create RED test suite: test-reviewer-blindspot-annotations.sh | RED | open |
| ab01-e486 | Add AI Blindspot Annotations to deep-hygiene delta | UPDATE | open |
| 9b97-76ac | Add AI Blindspot Annotations to deep-correctness delta | UPDATE | open |
| 87f4-e93f | Add AI Blindspot Annotations to deep-arch delta | UPDATE | open |
| 267d-ec8e | Add condensed AI Blindspot Annotations to standard delta | UPDATE | open |
| 45c0-02f1 | Add AI Blindspot Annotations to light delta + remove RED markers | UPDATE | open |
| f99f-7a88 | Add AC library categories (Security Boundary, Arch Integrity, Pattern Compliance) | GREEN | open |

Dependency chain: 77aa-0905 → ab01-e486 → 9b97-76ac → 87f4-e93f → 267d-ec8e → 45c0-02f1 (serial); f99f-7a88 independent.

Plan review: 3 revision cycles; all critical/major findings resolved. Two minor findings incorporated directly (T1 RED marker exclusivity Verify, T6 SC1(e) commit message note).

Gap analysis findings applied as ticket comments on 77aa-0905 and 45c0-02f1.
